records.name: Privacy Policy
records.content:
Privacy policy

Statement Information User

While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you. Web servers (the computers that "serve up" Web pages) automatically identify your computer by its IP address; when you request a page from Dealbuygo.com, our servers log your IP address.We collect this information for the purpose of providing the Service and Web traffic analysis and trend.

Log Files

We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service. This information includes IP addresses, browser type, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages and other statistics.

Cookies

Like many online services, we use cookies to collect information. Cookies are sent to your browser from a web site and transferred to your device. We use cookies to collect information in order to improve our services for you. If you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some features of our Service and we recommend that you leave them turned on.

Links To Other Sites

We offer some of our Service in connection with other third parties, We process your information in accordance with this Privacy Policy, however, such third parties may have different privacy practices. Therefore, we encourage you to read their privacy policies prior to disclosing any Personal Information.

Third Party Company Service Provider

We may receive Personal and about you from companies that provide our Service by way of a co-branded or private-labeled website, companies that offer their products and/or services through our Service, and/or companies that otherwise collect such information. These third parties have access to your Personal Information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use your information for any other purpose.

Affiliates

We may share some or all your Personal Data with our parent company, subsidiaries, joint ventures, or other companies under a common control ("Affiliates"), in which case we will require our Affiliates to honor this Privacy Statement.

Individuals under 13

No information should be submitted on couponfunnels.com by users under the age of 13 years without consent of their parent or guardian. Dealbuygo.com does not provide any personally-identifying information for users under the age of 13, regardless of its source, to any third party for any purpose whatsoever unless disclosed during collection. We encourage parents and legal guardians to monitor their children's Internet usage and to help enforce our Privacy Policy by instructing their children never to provide Personal Information to us without their parent's or legal guardian's permission.

International Transfer

Your information, including Personal Information, may be transferred to — and maintained on — computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ than those from your jurisdiction.

If you are located outside United States and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the information, including Personal Information, to United States and process it there.

Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer.

records.name: DozeCBD Review (2025): Affordable UK CBD Store or Risky Choice?
records.sapo:
1) Quick Take
DozeCBD is a UK-based cannabis store selling CBD flowers, oils, edibles, vapes, and extracts. They’ve attracted a large following with affordable prices and frequent sales on HHC and CBD products. However, Trustpilot removed their overall star rating due to guideline breaches. While 81% of their 1,400+ reviews are 5★, complaints about delivery delays, poor communication, and inconsistent quality are common.

If you’re searching “DozeCBD review 2025”, the short answer: DozeCBD offers good deals but comes with mixed reliability.
https://dozecbd.co.uk/?ref=DEALS88
records.content:
2) What They Sell

  • CBD & HHC Products: Flowers, crumble, wax, pre-rolls, vapes.

  • Extracts: Broad-spectrum concentrates like Alien OG 85 CBD Wax.

  • Oils & Edibles.

  • Target audience: UK buyers seeking affordable CBD/HHC with variety.

3) Customer Feedback

Positive (majority)

  • “Beyond happy with my order. My flower wasn’t great at first, but customer service replaced it for free. Brilliant support.” (Kai Da’Costa, Aug 26, 2025)

  • “HHC crumble was 75% overweight—amazing value!” (tjisles, Jun 24, 2025)

  • Many customers say DozeCBD helps with sleep, anxiety, and pain relief.

Negative (≈10–20%)

  • Complaints about lost or delayed orders with little support.

  • Reports of old/dry flower and even half-filled pre-rolls.

  • Some say refunds are denied if parcels are delayed by couriers.

4) Example Product Highlight: Alien OG 85 CBD Wax

From YouTube reviewers:

  • Smell: Sparkling cola, pine, and light herbal tones.

  • Taste: Cola-sweet terp profile that stays strong at both low and high temps.

  • Effects: Stress relief, pain reduction, clear-headed calmness, good for daytime use.

  • Texture: Easy to handle, good crystal formation, not sticky.

5) Pros & Cons

Pros ✅

  • Huge product variety (CBD + HHC).

  • Affordable pricing and frequent sales.

  • Some products test well in reviews (clean wax, strong terp profiles).

  • Replacement service reported by satisfied buyers.

Cons ❌

  • Trustpilot rating removed due to misleading practices.

  • Many complaints about quality inconsistency (dry or mislabelled flower).

  • Poor delivery reliability—tracking often missing.

  • Refunds disputed in some negative reviews.

6) Verdict

Is DozeCBD worth it in 2025?
⚠️ Yes, but with caution. DozeCBD is popular for low prices and variety, but their customer service and quality control are inconsistent. If you’re budget-conscious and don’t mind taking a risk, you may find great value. But if you need dependable shipping and guaranteed quality, you may prefer more established CBD retailers in the UK.

records.name: Collov AI Review: The Smart AI Tool for Virtual Staging and Interior Design
records.sapo: Discover how Collov AI helps real estate agents and designers create stunning virtual staging and interior designs in minutes. Learn about its features, pricing, pros, and why it’s becoming a popular AI design tool.
records.content:
Collov AI Review: A Powerful AI Tool for Virtual Staging and Interior Design

In today’s digital real estate market, high-quality visuals play a crucial role in attracting buyers and increasing engagement. This is where Collov AI stands out as an innovative solution. It is an AI-powered platform designed to create realistic virtual staging, interior design visualizations, and marketing visuals for properties quickly and affordably.

Whether you are a real estate agent, interior designer, or property marketer, Collov AI can help transform empty rooms into beautifully furnished spaces in just minutes.

What is Collov AI?

Collov AI is an artificial intelligence platform that allows users to upload photos of rooms or properties and instantly generate realistic interior design or virtual staging images. The platform uses advanced spatial intelligence to automatically add furniture, adjust layouts, and create photorealistic scenes.

The software was developed by Collov Labs and aims to simplify property marketing and design visualization through automation and AI technology.

Instead of spending thousands of dollars on traditional home staging, users can create professional designs online at a fraction of the cost.

Key Features of Collov AI

1. AI Virtual Staging

One of the main features of Collov AI is its virtual staging capability. Users simply upload a photo of an empty room and the AI automatically furnishes it with stylish furniture and décor. This helps real estate listings look more attractive and engaging for potential buyers.

2. Interior Design Visualization

Collov AI also helps homeowners and designers visualize renovations and decoration ideas. You can experiment with different furniture styles, colors, and layouts before making real changes.

3. AI Virtual Tour Generation

Another powerful feature is the ability to transform property photos into short virtual tour videos. These videos can enhance real estate marketing campaigns and increase viewer engagement.

4. Multiple Design Styles

The platform offers a variety of interior design styles such as modern, minimalist, Scandinavian, or classic, allowing users to tailor visuals to specific audiences.

5. Fast and Easy Workflow

Collov AI is designed with a simple interface and minimal learning curve. Even beginners can generate high-quality results quickly without advanced design skills.

Pricing

Collov AI offers flexible pricing depending on how many images or rooms you want to stage.

Typical pricing options include:

  • Virtual staging starting around $15–$19 per room.

  • Bulk staging discounts for larger projects.

  • Subscription plans starting from around $16 per month depending on features and usage.

  • A free trial is also available for new users to test the platform.

Compared to traditional home staging that can cost thousands of dollars, AI staging with Collov AI can save up to 90% or more.

Pros and Cons

Pros

  • Easy-to-use interface suitable for beginners

  • Fast AI-generated staging and interior design visuals

  • Affordable compared to traditional staging

  • Multiple design styles and customization options

  • Useful for real estate marketing and property listings

Cons

  • Some users report limited customization options

  • Customer support experiences vary among users

  • Results depend on the quality of uploaded images

Who Should Use Collov AI?

Collov AI is ideal for:

  • Real estate agents who want to enhance property listings

  • Interior designers looking for quick concept visualizations

  • Property marketers creating attractive promotional materials

  • Homeowners planning renovations or décor ideas

By automating staging and design visualization, the platform helps professionals save both time and money while producing visually appealing results.

Final Verdict

Collov AI is a powerful and affordable AI design tool that simplifies virtual staging and interior visualization. Its fast processing, intuitive interface, and realistic results make it a valuable solution for real estate professionals and designers alike.

If you want to enhance property marketing, visualize interior designs, or create engaging listing visuals, Collov AI is definitely worth trying.

Tagembed is a powerful social media aggregation platform that enables businesses to collect, curate, and display content from multiple social channels in one unified and visually appealing feed. Designed for marketers, eCommerce brands, and agencies, Tagembed helps transform user-generated content into a high-performing marketing asset that builds trust and drives conversions.

With support for major platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, and popular review sites, Tagembed allows businesses to showcase authentic customer experiences directly on their websites. By embedding real-time content feeds, brands can create a more dynamic and interactive browsing experience for visitors.

One of the key advantages of Tagembed is its ease of use. The platform requires no coding skills, making it accessible for users of all experience levels. With a simple setup process, businesses can quickly create and customize social media widgets to match their brand identity. Users can choose from a variety of layouts, themes, colors, and display options, ensuring seamless integration with any website design.

Tagembed also offers advanced content moderation features, allowing users to filter and control what content appears on their website. This ensures that only relevant and high-quality posts are displayed, helping maintain a consistent and professional brand image. Additionally, the platform leverages efficient caching and CDN technology to deliver fast-loading widgets that do not impact website speed or performance.

For businesses looking to go further, Tagembed includes powerful features such as shoppable feeds, enabling brands to turn social content into direct sales opportunities. Its built-in analytics provide valuable insights into user behavior and engagement, helping businesses optimize their marketing strategies. Higher-tier plans also include AI-powered moderation and enhanced customization capabilities for more advanced needs.

Tagembed offers flexible pricing plans tailored to different business sizes and requirements, from a free plan for beginners to advanced solutions for large-scale enterprises. This scalability makes it a suitable choice for startups, small businesses, and global brands alike.

In today’s digital landscape, where authenticity and trust are essential, Tagembed provides a smart and effective way to leverage social media content. By turning real customer interactions into compelling website experiences, Tagembed helps businesses strengthen their online presence, improve engagement, and increase conversions.

IGNOU Galaxy is an online platform designed to support students enrolled in the Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU), one of the largest distance learning institutions in the world. The website provides a wide range of academic services, including solved assignments, handwritten assignments, project guidance, and study materials tailored to various IGNOU programs.

The primary goal of IGNOU Galaxy is to help students manage their coursework more efficiently by offering ready-made academic resources. Assignments play a crucial role in IGNOU’s evaluation system, contributing significantly to final grades and eligibility for term-end examinations. As a result, many students turn to platforms like IGNOU Galaxy to access reference materials and improve their academic performance.

In addition to assignments, the platform also offers guess papers, guides, and consultation services intended to simplify the learning process for distance education students. These resources are especially useful for individuals balancing studies with work or other commitments, as they save time and provide structured guidance.

However, users should approach such services with caution. Some external reviews indicate mixed credibility, highlighting concerns such as unrealistic guarantees, lack of transparent information, and varying customer feedback. While the platform claims to provide verified and high-quality content, students are advised to use these materials as references rather than direct submissions to avoid academic issues.

Overall, IGNOU Galaxy serves as a supplementary academic support website aimed at easing the challenges of distance learning. It can be helpful for guidance and practice, but responsible use and independent study remain essential for long-term success in IGNOU programs.

records.name: Zentyal
records.description: Zentyal is a Linux server platform providing Active Directory, email, and network management solutions for small and medium businesses.
records.about_store:
Zentyal is a Linux-based server solution designed to simplify IT infrastructure management for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Built on Ubuntu, it serves as an all-in-one platform that combines essential network services such as domain management, email hosting, security, and gateway functionality into a single, easy-to-use system.

One of Zentyal’s key strengths is its native compatibility with Microsoft Active Directory, allowing organizations to manage Windows users, devices, and permissions seamlessly without disrupting existing workflows. This makes it a cost-effective alternative to traditional Windows Server environments, as it eliminates the need for expensive client access licenses (CALs) while maintaining similar functionality.

The platform includes several core modules. The Domain & Directory Server enables centralized user and group management, while the Mail Server supports industry-standard protocols such as SMTP, POP3, and IMAP for reliable communication. Additionally, the Gateway & Infrastructure module helps manage network services like DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewall, and proxy, ensuring secure and efficient connectivity across the organization.

Zentyal also emphasizes ease of use through its web-based interface, allowing administrators to configure and monitor services without advanced Linux expertise. By consolidating multiple IT functions into one platform, it reduces complexity and streamlines daily operations, enabling businesses to focus more on growth rather than infrastructure management.

Originally launched as an open-source project, Zentyal has evolved into a flexible server solution adopted by organizations worldwide. It can be deployed as a standalone server or integrated into existing environments, offering scalability and adaptability depending on business needs.

Overall, Zentyal is a practical and efficient solution for organizations seeking a unified, cost-effective, and user-friendly way to manage their IT systems while maintaining compatibility with Windows-based networks.

records.name: RetraStrap
records.description: RetraStrap is a travel product website offering a retractable strap that enables hands-free carry-on luggage handling for easier mobility.
records.about_store:
RetraStrap is a niche e-commerce website focused on a single innovative travel accessory designed to simplify the way people handle carry-on luggage. The platform promotes a retractable strap system that attaches to wheeled suitcases, allowing users to move through airports and other travel environments completely hands-free.

The core idea behind RetraStrap is convenience. Instead of constantly pulling or guiding a suitcase, users can secure the strap to their body and let the luggage follow behind. This design reduces strain on the arms and shoulders while freeing up hands for other tasks such as holding a phone, coffee, or travel documents. The product also adds an element of safety by keeping the luggage physically attached to the traveler, helping prevent loss or theft.

Originally introduced through a crowdfunding campaign, RetraStrap gained early traction among travelers interested in practical, lightweight solutions. Since then, it has been marketed as an alternative to more complex or expensive travel technologies, such as motorized suitcases.

Customer feedback for RetraStrap is generally positive but mixed. Some reviews highlight its usefulness and convenience, while others point out limitations in customer service, shipping policies, or overall brand recognition. Overall, the product receives a moderate rating compared to competitors in the luggage accessories market.

From a technical standpoint, the website itself appears relatively safe to browse, though it is considered a smaller and less established online store. Users are advised to review policies and product details carefully before making a purchase.

In summary, RetraStrap is a specialized travel accessory platform that offers a simple yet practical solution for hands-free luggage movement. It is particularly appealing to frequent travelers seeking convenience, though buyers should consider reviews and policies before purchasing.

records.name: Socialpilot
records.description: SocialPilot is a social media management platform offering scheduling, analytics, collaboration, and automation tools for businesses and agencies.
records.about_store:
SocialPilot is a comprehensive social media management tool designed to help businesses, marketers, and agencies streamline their online presence across multiple platforms. It provides an all-in-one solution for scheduling posts, managing conversations, analyzing performance, and collaborating with team members from a single dashboard.

One of SocialPilot’s core features is its powerful publishing system. Users can plan and schedule posts in advance across major platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Twitter (X), Pinterest, and Google Business. The platform supports bulk scheduling via CSV uploads, smart queues, and a visual content calendar, making it easy to maintain a consistent posting strategy.

In addition to publishing, SocialPilot offers robust analytics tools that allow users to track engagement, audience growth, and content performance. Detailed reports can be generated and shared with clients or team members, including white-label reports for agencies managing multiple brands.

Collaboration is another key strength. The platform enables teams to work together through approval workflows, shared content libraries, and role-based access controls. Agencies benefit from features like client management and approval systems, ensuring smooth communication and efficient campaign execution.

SocialPilot also integrates AI-powered features, including content generation and automated responses, helping users save time and improve productivity. Additionally, tools like the social inbox allow users to manage messages, comments, and interactions from multiple channels in one place.

The platform offers flexible pricing plans, starting from affordable options for individuals and scaling up to advanced plans for large teams and agencies, with features such as unlimited users, advanced analytics, and white-label capabilities.

Overall, SocialPilot is a cost-effective and user-friendly solution for managing social media at scale. It is particularly well-suited for small to medium-sized businesses and marketing agencies looking for a balance between functionality, ease of use, and pricing.

records.name: DataSift
records.description: DataSift is a real estate CRM and data platform that helps investors manage leads, automate marketing, and close deals efficiently.
records.about_store:
DataSift is a modern real estate data management and CRM platform designed to help investors, wholesalers, and agents streamline their marketing and deal-closing processes. The platform combines data intelligence, automation, and customer relationship management into a single system, eliminating the need to juggle multiple tools.

At its core, DataSift focuses on helping users turn raw property data into actionable insights. It allows users to upload, clean, and organize large datasets while automatically identifying high-potential leads. Features such as list stacking, filtering, and tagging help investors prioritize prospects based on motivation and opportunity.

One of the platform’s key advantages is its built-in CRM functionality. Users can manage leads, track deals, and create customized workflows through tools like task management, automation sequences, and visual pipeline boards. This ensures that no opportunity is overlooked and that teams stay aligned throughout the sales process.

DataSift also integrates predictive data and marketing tools, allowing users to run campaigns, perform skip tracing, and access property-related data such as ownership details, equity, and foreclosure information. These capabilities help reduce marketing costs while improving targeting accuracy and conversion rates.

Another notable feature is its nationwide data access and mapping tools, enabling investors to analyze markets, run property comparisons, and identify buyers within the same platform. By combining data, automation, and analytics, DataSift helps users move faster from prospecting to closing deals.

Overall, DataSift is a comprehensive solution tailored for real estate professionals who want to scale their operations efficiently. It is particularly valuable for those seeking to simplify workflows, reduce costs, and increase deal flow through better data-driven decision-making.

records.name: Propelio
records.description: Propelio is a real estate investing platform offering property data, lead generation, CRM tools, and deal analysis in one system.
records.about_store:
Propelio is a cloud-based real estate investing software designed to help investors, wholesalers, and agents find, analyze, and manage property deals more efficiently. It serves as an all-in-one platform that combines property data, lead generation, marketing tools, and customer relationship management (CRM) into a single, streamlined system.

One of Propelio’s core strengths is its access to MLS comparables (comps), which allow users to evaluate property values based on recent sales data. This feature is particularly valuable for estimating after-repair value (ARV) and making informed investment decisions. In addition, the platform provides detailed property data such as ownership records, tax information, and mortgage history, helping investors identify high-potential opportunities.

Propelio also includes lead generation and list-building tools that enable users to target motivated sellers, such as absentee owners or pre-foreclosures. These lists can be filtered and exported for marketing campaigns like cold calling or direct mail. The built-in “Driving for Dollars” feature allows investors to scout neighborhoods, track routes, and add properties directly into the system using a mobile app.

Another key feature is its integrated CRM, which helps users organize leads, manage follow-ups, and track deals from start to finish. By consolidating multiple functions into one platform, Propelio reduces the need for separate tools and simplifies workflows for real estate professionals.

In terms of pricing, Propelio offers flexible plans starting from a free tier, with paid options ranging from approximately $29 to $98 per month depending on features and usage limits. This makes it a cost-effective solution compared to competitors that often require multiple subscriptions.

Overall, Propelio is a practical and affordable solution for real estate investors who want a simple, data-driven platform to manage deals, generate leads, and scale their business efficiently.

records.name: Mailivery
records.description: Mailivery is an email warm-up platform that improves deliverability, boosts sender reputation, and helps emails land in primary inboxes.
records.about_store:
Mailivery is an AI-powered email warm-up and deliverability platform designed to help businesses, marketers, and sales teams improve their email performance. Its primary goal is to ensure that outreach emails land in recipients’ primary inbox instead of being filtered into spam or promotions folders.

The platform works by connecting to a user’s email account and generating automated, natural interactions with a network of real mailboxes. These interactions include sending, opening, replying to, and organizing emails in a way that mimics genuine human behavior. This process helps build a strong sender reputation, which is a key factor used by email providers like Gmail and Outlook to determine inbox placement.

One of Mailivery’s standout features is its use of AI combined with a peer-to-peer network of active inboxes. This allows the system to simulate real engagement signals, such as positive replies and inbox movements, which significantly improve deliverability over time. Additionally, the platform can detect when emails land in spam folders and automatically move them to the inbox, reinforcing trust with email service providers.

Mailivery also offers advanced analytics and monitoring tools. Users can track how many emails reach spam versus the inbox, monitor blacklist status across multiple databases, and receive actionable recommendations to improve email health. These insights help users optimize their campaigns and maintain consistent performance.

The platform supports unlimited mailboxes under one account and includes team collaboration features, making it suitable for agencies and growing businesses. It integrates with major email providers such as Gmail, Outlook, and others via SMTP/IMAP, ensuring flexibility across different systems.

In terms of pricing, Mailivery offers tiered subscription plans based on daily warm-up volume, starting from affordable entry-level options and scaling up for larger teams with higher sending needs.

Overall, Mailivery is a powerful solution for anyone running cold email campaigns or outreach strategies. By improving sender reputation and ensuring better inbox placement, it helps increase open rates, engagement, and ultimately conversion results.

records.name: Klenty
records.description: Klenty is an AI-powered sales engagement platform that automates outreach, improves productivity, and helps teams generate more leads and meetings.
records.about_store:
Klenty is a modern AI-powered sales engagement platform designed to help businesses streamline their outbound sales processes and improve team productivity. It enables sales development representatives (SDRs), marketers, and agencies to manage multi-channel outreach, automate repetitive tasks, and build stronger relationships with prospects.

At its core, Klenty focuses on automating sales workflows across multiple communication channels, including email, phone calls, SMS, and LinkedIn. Users can create structured outreach sequences (also known as cadences) that automatically send personalized messages, schedule follow-ups, and track engagement. This allows sales teams to stay consistent in their outreach without manually managing every interaction.

One of Klenty’s standout features is its AI integration. The platform uses AI agents to assist with prospect research, generate personalized messaging, and automate next steps after interactions. This helps sales teams reduce manual workload and focus more on meaningful conversations and closing deals.

Klenty also includes a powerful built-in dialer system, such as parallel and power dialers, enabling users to make hundreds of calls per hour while automating tasks like voicemail detection, note-taking, and CRM updates. This significantly boosts calling efficiency and overall outreach volume.

In addition, the platform offers advanced email deliverability tools, analytics, and reporting features. These help users monitor campaign performance, improve inbox placement, and optimize outreach strategies based on real-time data. Integration with major CRM systems like Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and Pipedrive ensures seamless data synchronization and workflow automation.

Founded with the mission to make sales professionals more effective, Klenty is now used by thousands of teams across multiple countries. It is particularly well-suited for B2B sales teams looking to scale outbound efforts, increase meeting bookings, and drive consistent pipeline growth through automation and AI.

records.name: Tolstoy
records.description: Tolstoy is an AI-powered commerce platform that boosts conversions using shoppable videos, interactive UGC, and personalized AI sales chatbots.
records.about_store:
Tolstoy is a leading AI Commerce platform designed to revolutionize the way e-commerce brands engage with their customers and drive sales. By moving beyond static images and traditional text, Tolstoy enables businesses to create immersive, interactive shopping experiences that build trust and significantly increase conversion rates.

The platform is built around three core pillars: AI Player, AI Studio, and AI Shopper.

The AI Player is a sophisticated shoppable video solution. It allows brands to integrate high-quality video content and User-Generated Content (UGC) directly onto their websites, apps, and even through email or SMS. These videos are not just for viewing; they are interactive, allowing customers to click on products within the video and add them to their cart instantly. This seamless integration reduces friction in the buyer's journey and provides social proof through authentic content.

AI Studio empowers brands to generate high-performing creative assets at scale. Using advanced AI, businesses can create and edit product images and videos through a simple chat interface. This tool is particularly useful for catalog-wide content generation, ensuring that every product has high-quality visuals without the need for constant, expensive photoshoots.

Finally, AI Shopper acts as a virtual sales agent. It is a personalized AI chatbot trained on a brand’s specific product catalog. It can answer customer questions, provide tailored product recommendations, and even offer virtual try-on experiences. By understanding individual customer preferences, it personalizes the shopping journey in real-time, much like an in-store assistant.

Trusted by over 2,000 brands, Tolstoy has proven its effectiveness with reported conversion lifts of up to 10x. It integrates seamlessly with major platforms like Shopify, making it an essential tool for modern e-commerce brands looking to leverage the power of AI and video to dominate the digital marketplace.

records.name: Curate
records.description: Curate is a premium social commerce platform connecting influencers with luxury brands to discover, share, and earn through personalized storefronts.
records.about_store:
Curate.co is a sophisticated social commerce and affiliate marketing platform specifically designed for the modern creator economy. It serves as a bridge between high-end influencers, tastemakers, and premium global brands, moving beyond traditional affiliate links to provide a more integrated and aesthetically pleasing shopping experience.

The core of the Curate experience is the "Curated Storefront." Instead of simply sharing a list of links, creators can build their own personalized digital boutiques. These storefronts allow influencers to organize their favorite products—ranging from luxury fashion and beauty to home decor—into visually stunning collections. This approach provides followers with a seamless way to "shop the look" directly from their favorite creators, fostering a sense of trust and authenticity that traditional advertising often lacks.

For brands, Curate.co offers an elite network of vetted creators who resonate with target audiences. The platform provides robust tracking and analytics, allowing both brands and influencers to monitor engagement, clicks, and conversion rates in real-time. This data-driven approach ensures that partnerships are mutually beneficial and that content is optimized for the highest possible performance.

Curate.co differentiates itself through its focus on quality and exclusivity. The platform’s interface is sleek and minimalist, echoing the luxury brands it hosts. By simplifying the backend logistics—such as link management, commission tracking, and payment processing—Curate allows creators to focus on what they do best: creating compelling content and building communities.

Ultimately, Curate.co is more than just a tool; it is a comprehensive ecosystem that empowers influencers to monetize their influence professionally while providing consumers with a curated, high-quality path to discovery in the digital marketplace.

records.name: Skedsocial
records.description: Sked Social is an all-in-one social media management platform specializing in automated scheduling, visual planning, and advanced analytics for Instagram.
records.about_store:
Sked Social is a comprehensive social media management and scheduling platform designed specifically for brands, agencies, and retail marketers who prioritize visual storytelling. Originally built as a dedicated tool for Instagram, it has evolved into a robust multi-platform solution that supports Facebook, Pinterest, Twitter (X), LinkedIn, Google Business Profile, and TikTok.

The platform’s standout feature is its "true" auto-posting capability. Unlike many competitors that rely on mobile notifications to remind users to post manually, Sked Social handles the entire process automatically—including Reels, Carousels, and Stories. This automation allows social media managers to maintain a consistent online presence without being tethered to their devices 24/7.

Sked Social offers a powerful Visual Planner that features a drag-and-drop interface. This allows users to see exactly how their Instagram grid will look before they publish, ensuring a cohesive brand aesthetic. Additionally, the platform includes a built-in photo editor and integration with Canva, making it easy to create and refine high-quality content within a single workflow.

Beyond scheduling, Sked Social provides deep analytical insights. Users can track follower growth, engagement rates, and the best times to post based on their specific audience behavior. It also includes a "Link in Bio" tool, which transforms a single Instagram link into a shoppable, branded landing page, effectively driving traffic from social media to e-commerce sites.

With collaborative features that allow for team approvals and client feedback, Sked Social streamlines the entire content lifecycle from ideation to execution. It is an essential tool for businesses looking to save time, improve their visual strategy, and maximize the ROI of their social media efforts through professional-grade automation and data-driven decision-making.

records.name: Dropified
records.description: Dropified is a powerful e-commerce automation platform that streamlines dropshipping by automating product sourcing, order fulfillment, and inventory management.
records.about_store:
Dropified is a leading e-commerce automation software designed to help entrepreneurs and business owners build, manage, and scale their dropshipping businesses with ease. By focusing on "automation first," the platform eliminates the tedious manual tasks typically associated with running an online store, allowing users to focus more on marketing and strategic growth.

The platform's primary strength lies in its seamless integration with major e-commerce builders like Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, and CommerceHQ. Dropified allows users to source products from dozens of top-tier suppliers—including AliExpress, eBay, and Alibaba—and import them into their stores with a single click. This includes importing product descriptions, high-quality images, and customer reviews to build immediate social proof.

One of its most acclaimed features is automated order fulfillment. When a customer places an order on your site, Dropified can automatically purchase that product from the supplier and send it directly to the customer, significantly reducing the risk of manual data entry errors. Furthermore, the platform provides real-time price and inventory alerts; if a supplier changes a price or runs out of stock, Dropified automatically updates your store to protect your profit margins and customer satisfaction.

Beyond standard dropshipping, Dropified offers specialized features like Private Label On-Demand, which enables users to create their own branded supplements and skincare lines without the need for massive upfront inventory investments. It also includes advanced tools such as a built-in image editor, high-speed "CAPTCHA-solver" for faster ordering, and a "Profit Dashboard" to track your business's financial health in real-time.

By centralizing the entire supply chain and automating the heavy lifting, Dropified transforms the complex world of e-commerce into a streamlined, professional, and highly scalable operation for sellers of all experience levels.

records.name: Amitree
records.description: Amitree provides Folio, an AI-powered email organizer that automatically categorizes real estate transactions, documents, and timelines within your inbox.
records.about_store:
Amitree is a leading technology company dedicated to transforming the way real estate professionals manage their workflows. Its flagship product, Folio, is an intelligent productivity tool designed to solve the chaos of the "overflowing inbox," specifically tailored for the high-stakes environment of real estate transactions. By leveraging advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning, Amitree helps agents, brokers, and their clients stay organized without the need for manual data entry.

The platform functions as a sophisticated layer that sits directly inside Gmail or Outlook. Once installed, Folio automatically identifies real estate-related emails and organizes them into "Smart Folders" based on the specific property address or transaction. It intelligently extracts key dates, contacts, and essential documents from email threads, creating a centralized dashboard for every deal. This ensures that critical information—such as inspection deadlines, closing dates, and contract amendments—is never lost in a long chain of messages.

Beyond simple organization, Amitree empowers agents to provide a superior client experience. Agents can share interactive timelines with their buyers and sellers, giving clients a clear, professional roadmap of the closing process. This transparency reduces repetitive questions and builds immense trust. The platform also integrates seamlessly with other essential tools like DocuSign, Google Drive, and various calendar applications, ensuring that the entire transaction ecosystem is synchronized.

With over 100,000 real estate professionals trusting the platform, Amitree’s Folio has become an industry standard for efficiency. By automating the administrative "heavy lifting," it allows agents to reclaim hours of their week, reduce the risk of missed deadlines, and focus their energy on what matters most: closing deals and nurturing client relationships. It is an essential tool for any modern agent looking to professionalize their workflow through the power of AI.

records.name: ReadyCloud
records.description: ReadyCloud is an e-commerce CRM platform that integrates shipping, returns, and customer data to enhance post-purchase experiences and loyalty.
records.about_store:
ReadyCloud is a comprehensive e-commerce CRM (Customer Relationship Management) solution designed to bridge the gap between sales, logistics, and customer service. Unlike traditional CRMs, ReadyCloud is built specifically for online retailers, focusing on the "post-purchase" journey to turn one-time buyers into lifelong customers. By consolidating data from various sales channels into a single interface, it provides a 360-degree view of the customer's lifecycle.

The platform's strength lies in its modular suite of tools, primarily ReadyShipper and ReadyReturns.

ReadyShipper is a robust shipping software that streamlines the fulfillment process. It connects directly with major carriers like USPS, UPS, and FedEx, allowing merchants to compare rates, print labels in bulk, and automate tracking updates. By optimizing shipping workflows, businesses can reduce costs and ensure faster delivery times.

ReadyReturns is an automated, "Amazon-like" returns portal that can be embedded directly into a merchant's website. It empowers customers to initiate their own returns, print labels, and track the status of their exchange or refund. This self-service approach significantly reduces the burden on customer support teams while providing the transparency and ease-of-use that modern shoppers expect.

Beyond logistics, ReadyCloud acts as a powerful data hub. It automatically imports order history from platforms like Shopify, Amazon, eBay, and Magento. This allows marketing teams to see exactly what customers are buying, how often they return items, and their overall lifetime value. With features like tag-based segmentation and detailed reporting, businesses can create highly personalized marketing campaigns and loyalty programs.

In an era where customer experience is the primary differentiator, ReadyCloud provides the infrastructure necessary for e-commerce brands to scale efficiently, handle complex logistics with ease, and maintain professional relationships with their audience.

records.name: StoryChief
records.description: StoryChief is a central content marketing platform that streamlines collaboration, multi-channel publishing, and SEO optimization for agencies and marketing teams.
records.about_store:
StoryChief is an all-in-one content marketing and social media management solution designed to help B2B marketing teams and agencies scale their content production and distribution. It acts as a "central nervous system" for content creators, eliminating the need to jump between multiple tools, spreadsheets, and tabs to manage a single campaign.

The platform's primary value lies in its Multi-Channel Publishing capabilities. With one click, users can distribute articles and blog posts across various CMS platforms (like WordPress, Webflow, or Shopify), social media networks (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, X), and email newsletters. This "publish once, appear everywhere" approach significantly reduces manual workload and ensures brand consistency across the digital landscape.

StoryChief also features a powerful Collaborative Editor, which functions similarly to Google Docs but is purpose-built for marketing. It includes built-in SEO copywriting tools that provide real-time feedback on readability and keyword optimization, ensuring that every piece of content is primed for search engine rankings. Teams can leave comments, track version history, and manage approval workflows directly within the interface, making the path from a draft to a live post seamless and organized.

Beyond creation, the platform offers an Employee Advocacy module, allowing businesses to turn their staff into brand ambassadors by making it easy for them to share company content on their personal social profiles. This expands organic reach and builds authentic authority in the industry.

Finally, StoryChief provides a comprehensive Content Calendar and unified analytics. Users can visualize their entire marketing strategy in one place and track performance across all channels from a single dashboard. By centralizing the content lifecycle—from planning and creation to distribution and measurement—StoryChief empowers teams to focus on storytelling and strategy rather than administrative logistics.

records.name: iFax
records.description: iFax is a leading HIPAA-compliant digital faxing solution that allows users to send and receive faxes securely from any device.
records.about_store:
iFax is a pioneer in the digital transformation of traditional faxing, providing a modern, cloud-based platform that eliminates the need for bulky fax machines, paper, and dedicated phone lines. Designed for both individuals and large enterprises, iFax offers a seamless way to send and receive faxes through a mobile app, web browser, or desktop application, making it an essential tool for the remote-work era.

Security and compliance are the foundation of the iFax platform. It is fully HIPAA and GLBA compliant, featuring military-grade 256-bit AES encryption to ensure that sensitive documents remain private and secure during transmission. This makes it a preferred choice for industries that handle highly confidential information, such as healthcare, legal, finance, and government sectors.

The platform is engineered for maximum efficiency. Users can choose a local or toll-free fax number in over 58 countries and start faxing immediately. Its intuitive interface allows for easy document scanning using a smartphone camera, integration with cloud storage services like Google Drive, Dropbox, and OneDrive, and even digital signature capabilities. This "all-in-one" approach allows users to sign, send, and track faxes in real-time with delivery notifications.

For businesses, iFax provides a powerful Fax API and developer tools, allowing companies to integrate faxing capabilities directly into their existing software, CRMs, or EHR systems. It also supports team collaboration, enabling multiple users to manage a single fax number with centralized administrative controls.

With over 5 million users worldwide and millions of faxes sent, iFax combines the reliability of traditional faxing with the speed and convenience of modern cloud technology. It provides a cost-effective, eco-friendly, and highly secure solution for anyone looking to modernize their document communication workflows.

records.name: Helpwise
records.description: Helpwise is a unified shared inbox platform that streamlines team collaboration across email, SMS, WhatsApp, and social media channels.
records.about_store:
Helpwise is a powerful Shared Inbox and customer communication platform designed to help teams manage all their support and sales conversations from a single, centralized dashboard. By consolidating messages from various channels—including Gmail, Outlook, WhatsApp, SMS, Live Chat, and social media (Facebook, X, Instagram)—Helpwise eliminates the "tab-switching" fatigue and ensures that no customer query ever falls through the cracks.

The platform is built specifically for team collaboration. Instead of sharing passwords to a single email account, team members have their own logins to access shared mailboxes. Key features like "collision detection" prevent two agents from replying to the same thread simultaneously, while internal notes allow team members to chat privately within an email thread to coordinate the best response. This transparency ensures a consistent and professional voice across all customer interactions.

Helpwise also places a heavy emphasis on automation and efficiency. Users can set up smart rules to automatically assign conversations based on keywords, sender, or workload. It also features "Saved Responses" for frequently asked questions, allowing teams to provide instant, high-quality answers with just a few clicks. For managers, the platform provides deep analytical insights into team performance, tracking metrics such as average response time, resolution rate, and individual agent productivity.

Integration is another core strength of Helpwise. It connects seamlessly with over 50 popular business tools, including CRMs like HubSpot and Pipedrive, project management software like Slack and Trello, and e-commerce platforms like Shopify. This connectivity allows agents to see customer data directly alongside their messages, providing the context needed to personalize every conversation.

With its intuitive interface and robust feature set, Helpwise transforms chaotic communication channels into a streamlined, high-performance operation, making it an ideal solution for businesses looking to scale their customer service without losing the personal touch.

records.name: RunDiffusion
records.description: RunDiffusion is a cloud-based platform that provides instant access to powerful AI image generation tools like Stable Diffusion without setup.
records.about_store:
RunDiffusion is a high-performance cloud computing platform designed to make professional-grade generative AI accessible to everyone, from digital artists and designers to hobbyists. The platform specializes in providing pre-configured, managed environments for Stable Diffusion and other open-source AI models, allowing users to bypass the technical hurdles of complex installations, expensive hardware requirements, and dependency management.

The core value of RunDiffusion lies in its "one-click" philosophy. Users can launch a powerful GPU-backed private server in less than two minutes. These environments come pre-loaded with the most popular interfaces, such as Automatic1111, Forge, Fooocus, and ComfyUI. Furthermore, the platform provides an integrated file browser and a massive library of pre-installed models (Checkpoints), LoRAs, and ControlNet extensions, enabling users to start creating high-quality AI art immediately.

One of the standout features of RunDiffusion is its flexible, usage-based pricing model. Instead of committing to expensive monthly subscriptions, users can choose from different tiers of GPU power (ranging from entry-level to creator-pro speeds) and pay only for the time they are actually using the service. To help manage costs, the platform includes a "Smart Timer" that automatically shuts down the session if it detects inactivity, ensuring that users don't waste their credits.

Beyond image generation, RunDiffusion is expanding into video creation with tools like AnimateDiff and Deforum. The platform also offers a secure, private workspace, meaning your generated images and uploaded assets remain your own. With its creator-centric interface, robust server stability, and active community support, RunDiffusion serves as a premier destination for anyone looking to harness the power of state-of-the-art AI generation without the traditional hardware limitations or technical friction.

records.name: Search Atlas
records.description: SearchAtlas is a comprehensive, AI-driven SEO platform providing advanced tools for keyword research, content optimization, link building, and rank tracking.
records.about_store:
SearchAtlas is an all-in-one SEO software suite designed to empower brands, agencies, and content creators with data-driven insights to dominate search engine results. By combining advanced analytics with cutting-edge artificial intelligence, SearchAtlas simplifies the complexities of search engine optimization, making it accessible for both SEO experts and marketing generalists.

The platform stands out through its integrated approach to the content lifecycle. At its core is the OTTO SEO tool, an AI-powered assistant that automates technical audits and provides actionable recommendations to improve site health. For content strategists, the SEO Content Assistant is a flagship feature; it uses machine learning to analyze top-ranking competitors in real-time, suggesting specific keywords, headings, and semantic terms to help users write content that is mathematically optimized to rank.

Beyond content, SearchAtlas offers a robust Keyword Researcher tool that provides deep data on search volume, keyword difficulty, and user intent. This allows businesses to identify high-value opportunities and "content gaps" that their competitors may have missed. The platform also includes professional-grade Backlink Analysis and link-building tools, helping users monitor their backlink profile and identify authoritative sites for outreach to boost their domain authority.

For those managing multiple projects, the Site Auditor and Rank Tracker provide a bird's-eye view of performance. Users can track daily keyword movements across different geographic locations and devices, ensuring their strategy remains agile.

SearchAtlas differentiates itself by offering a "software + service" ecosystem, often providing educational resources and expert insights alongside its technical tools. By centralizing technical SEO, content marketing, and competitive intelligence into one intuitive interface, SearchAtlas helps businesses increase their organic traffic, improve their digital footprint, and achieve a higher return on their marketing investment.

records.name: Spotlightr
records.description: Spotlightr is a secure video hosting platform for marketers and course creators, offering branding, analytics, and powerful video marketing tools.
records.about_store:
Spotlightr is a comprehensive video hosting and marketing platform designed primarily for course creators, marketers, and online businesses. It provides users with a secure and scalable environment to upload, manage, and stream video content while maintaining full control over branding, performance, and audience engagement. Unlike traditional platforms, Spotlightr focuses on delivering a distraction-free experience, ensuring videos are displayed without ads or external branding.

One of the platform’s key strengths lies in its advanced security features. Spotlightr uses technologies such as HLS encryption and access controls to protect video content from unauthorized downloads, making it especially valuable for creators selling premium courses or exclusive materials. In addition, users can customize their video players to match their brand identity, enhancing professionalism and consistency across websites and learning platforms.

Spotlightr also integrates powerful marketing tools that go beyond simple video hosting. Users can embed call-to-action buttons, collect leads through email gating, and track viewer behavior with detailed analytics. These features enable businesses to convert viewers into customers more effectively and optimize their content strategy based on real engagement data.

Another notable advantage is its flexibility. The platform supports hybrid hosting, allowing users to connect videos from sources like YouTube or cloud storage while still leveraging Spotlightr’s player and marketing features. It also integrates with various third-party tools, making it easy to fit into existing workflows.

Overall, Spotlightr positions itself as an all-in-one solution for video hosting, marketing, and course delivery. With its combination of security, customization, and analytics, it helps creators and businesses maximize the value of their video content while maintaining full ownership and control.

records.name: Uxcel
records.description: Uxcel is an interactive learning platform for UX, product management, and AI, offering bite-sized lessons, certifications, and career growth tools.
records.about_store:
Uxcel is a modern online learning platform designed to help individuals and product teams build practical skills in UX design, product management, and artificial intelligence. It focuses on delivering interactive, bite-sized lessons that fit into busy schedules, allowing users to learn effectively in just a few minutes each day.

Unlike traditional e-learning platforms that rely heavily on long video lectures, Uxcel uses a gamified and engaging approach to learning. Its courses are structured into short modules with quizzes, challenges, and real-world scenarios, helping learners retain knowledge and apply it immediately. This method not only improves engagement but also supports consistent learning habits through features like progress tracking, streaks, and guided learning paths.

The platform offers a wide range of content tailored to different roles and experience levels. Whether users are beginners exploring UX fundamentals or experienced professionals advancing their skills in product strategy or AI integration, Uxcel provides structured career paths and role-based certifications. These certifications help validate skills and enhance career opportunities in competitive digital product fields.

Uxcel is also widely used by teams and organizations. With built-in dashboards and analytics, companies can track skill development, identify gaps, and align learning with business goals. The platform integrates seamlessly into daily workflows, supporting continuous upskilling without disrupting productivity.

Since its launch, Uxcel has attracted hundreds of thousands of learners and is trusted by companies, universities, and professionals worldwide. Its focus on practical, job-relevant skills and flexible learning makes it a powerful alternative to traditional education methods.

Overall, Uxcel stands out as a comprehensive solution for anyone looking to grow in the digital product space, combining interactive education, real-world application, and measurable career development in one platform.

records.name: Sendspark
records.description: Sendspark is an AI-powered video platform that helps businesses create personalized videos at scale for sales, marketing, and customer engagement.
records.about_store:
Sendspark is an innovative AI-driven video platform designed to help businesses create, personalize, and distribute video messages at scale. Built primarily for sales, marketing, and customer success teams, it enables users to record a single video and automatically generate thousands of personalized versions tailored to individual recipients. This approach significantly reduces production time while maintaining a highly personal and engaging communication style.

One of Sendspark’s standout features is its dynamic video personalization technology. Users can insert recipient-specific elements such as names, company logos, or even website backgrounds directly into videos, making each message feel unique and relevant. Combined with AI capabilities like voice cloning and automated video generation, Sendspark allows businesses to deliver customized experiences without the need for manual recording.

The platform also includes built-in tools for video recording, editing, and hosting. Users can capture their screen, webcam, or both, then quickly edit clips and share them via email, landing pages, or CRM integrations. Sendspark supports integration with over 50 tools, including popular platforms like HubSpot and Salesforce, enabling seamless incorporation into existing workflows.

In addition to creation and distribution, Sendspark provides robust analytics that allow users to track viewer engagement, watch time, and conversion performance. These insights help teams optimize their outreach strategies and improve ROI. Features such as personalized landing pages, embedded calls-to-action, and branded video experiences further enhance its effectiveness as a marketing and sales tool.

Sendspark is widely used across various business functions, from lead generation and sales prospecting to onboarding and customer support. By combining automation with personalization, it helps organizations stand out in crowded inboxes and build stronger, more human connections with their audiences. Overall, Sendspark offers a powerful solution for scaling video communication while preserving authenticity and impact.

records.name: Fish Audio
records.description: Fish Audio is an AI voice generation platform offering text-to-speech, voice cloning, and expressive audio tools for creators and developers.
records.about_store:
Fish Audio is an advanced AI-powered voice platform that enables users to create highly realistic and expressive audio content through cutting-edge voice technologies. Designed for creators, developers, and businesses, it offers a full suite of tools including text-to-speech, voice cloning, and speech-to-text, allowing users to produce professional-quality audio without the need for traditional recording equipment.

One of the platform’s standout features is its ability to generate natural-sounding voices with precise emotional control. Users can adjust tone, mood, and delivery style using customizable tags, making it possible to create dynamic and engaging audio for various use cases such as storytelling, marketing videos, and virtual assistants. Fish Audio also supports multilingual voice generation, enabling content creators to reach global audiences with ease.

Another key capability is voice cloning, which allows users to replicate a specific voice using only a short audio sample—sometimes as little as 10 to 15 seconds. This feature is particularly useful for building personalized voice assistants, character voices for games and animations, or consistent narration for podcasts and audiobooks.

Fish Audio is built with scalability and flexibility in mind. It provides APIs and developer tools that allow seamless integration into applications, enabling real-time voice streaming and interactive voice experiences. The platform also includes a large library of voices—over two million options—giving users a wide range of styles and personalities to choose from.

In addition to content creation, Fish Audio supports various industries including education, gaming, customer service, and accessibility. From generating immersive audiobook narration to powering conversational chatbots, the platform helps streamline workflows and reduce production costs significantly compared to traditional voice recording.

Overall, Fish Audio stands out as a powerful and versatile solution for modern audio production. By combining realism, customization, and scalability, it empowers users to create engaging voice experiences efficiently and at scale.

records.name: Picky Assist
records.description: Picky Assist is an all-in-one business automation platform combining WhatsApp chatbots, CRM, and AI tools to improve sales, marketing, and customer engagement.
records.about_store:
Picky Assist is a comprehensive business automation platform designed to help companies streamline communication, manage customer relationships, and drive growth through WhatsApp and multi-channel messaging. Founded in 2018, the platform combines chatbot automation, conversational CRM, and AI-powered tools into a single unified solution tailored for sales, marketing, and customer support teams.

At its core, Picky Assist focuses on automating customer interactions across channels such as WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Instagram, and email. Businesses can build no-code chatbots that respond instantly to inquiries, capture leads, and guide customers through the buying journey. This automation enables companies to operate 24/7, reduce manual workload, and improve response times significantly.

The platform also features a powerful conversational CRM that centralizes all customer interactions in one place. Teams can manage leads, assign tasks, track deal progress, and collaborate through a shared inbox, ensuring no opportunity is missed. By integrating workflows, funnels, and automation, Picky Assist helps businesses nurture leads and convert them into customers more efficiently.

Another key advantage is its WhatsApp-first approach. With features like broadcasting, payment automation, catalogs, and conversational funnels, businesses can engage customers directly on one of the world’s most widely used messaging platforms. Additionally, its AI capabilities—such as smart replies, sentiment analysis, and automated content generation—enhance productivity and decision-making.

Picky Assist also supports seamless integration with third-party tools like CRM systems, payment gateways, and marketing platforms, allowing businesses to build a fully connected ecosystem without complex development.

Trusted by thousands of customers across more than 80 countries, the platform is built to scale for businesses of all sizes, from startups to enterprises. Overall, Picky Assist offers a flexible and cost-effective solution for automating communication, improving customer experience, and accelerating business growth through intelligent automation.

records.name: Dorik
records.description: Dorik is an AI-powered no-code website builder that enables users to create, customize, and launch professional websites quickly without coding.
records.about_store:
Dorik is a modern AI-powered no-code website builder designed to help individuals, startups, and agencies create professional websites quickly and efficiently without any coding skills. Launched in 2020, the platform combines simplicity with powerful features, making it an attractive solution for users who want to build and manage websites without technical complexity.

One of Dorik’s core strengths is its AI website generation capability. Users can create a complete, fully designed website simply by entering a text prompt, with the platform automatically generating layout, content, and visuals in minutes. This significantly reduces development time and allows users to focus on content and business goals rather than technical setup.

Dorik also features an intuitive drag-and-drop editor, enabling users to customize pages visually using pre-built templates and UI blocks. With over 100 templates and hundreds of components available, users can easily design responsive, modern websites tailored to their needs. The platform includes built-in hosting, free SSL, and global CDN support, ensuring websites are secure and performant without requiring external services.

Another key advantage is its white-label CMS, which is especially beneficial for agencies and freelancers. This feature allows users to rebrand the platform, manage multiple client websites, and even handle billing within a single dashboard. Additionally, Dorik offers blogging tools, SEO features, integrations with third-party services like Airtable and Zapier, and support for membership sites.

Dorik is particularly well-suited for small businesses, creators, and agencies looking for a fast, affordable way to establish an online presence. While it may have some limitations in advanced customization compared to more complex builders, it excels in ease of use and speed.

Overall, Dorik provides an all-in-one solution for website creation, combining AI automation, visual design tools, and hosting into a single platform that simplifies the entire web development process.

records.name: Dmarcly
records.description: DMARCLY is an email security platform that helps prevent spoofing and phishing while improving deliverability through DMARC, SPF, and DKIM monitoring.
records.about_store:
DMARCLY is a specialized email security and authentication platform designed to help businesses protect their domains from spoofing, phishing, and other email-based threats. It focuses on implementing and managing key email authentication protocols—DMARC, SPF, and DKIM—while providing powerful monitoring and analytics tools to ensure email integrity and performance.

At its core, DMARCLY enables organizations to gain full visibility into their email ecosystem. Through an intuitive dashboard, users can monitor authentication results, identify unauthorized senders, and analyze how emails are being processed by receiving servers. This visibility helps businesses quickly detect vulnerabilities and take action before they impact customers or brand reputation.

One of the platform’s main benefits is its ability to prevent email spoofing and phishing attacks. By enforcing DMARC policies, DMARCLY ensures that only authorized sources can send emails on behalf of a domain. This not only protects customers and employees from fraudulent messages but also reduces the risk of financial loss and reputational damage.

In addition to security, DMARCLY plays a crucial role in improving email deliverability. Proper authentication increases a domain’s sender reputation, making legitimate emails more likely to reach inboxes instead of spam folders. The platform provides detailed reports and alerts, allowing users to optimize their email setup and maintain high deliverability rates.

DMARCLY also offers a wide range of tools, including record generators and checkers for SPF, DKIM, and DMARC, as well as advanced features like Safe SPF to overcome DNS lookup limitations. Automated XML report parsing and visual analytics simplify complex data, making it accessible even for non-technical users.

Designed for both beginners and experienced professionals, DMARCLY supports a step-by-step implementation process—from monitoring mode to full enforcement—ensuring a smooth transition to secure email practices. Overall, it provides a comprehensive solution for safeguarding email communications while enhancing performance and trust.

records.name: HostedScan
records.description: HostedScan is a vulnerability scanning platform that helps detect, manage, and fix security risks across websites, servers, networks, and APIs.
records.about_store:
HostedScan is a comprehensive cybersecurity platform designed to help businesses identify, manage, and remediate vulnerabilities across their digital infrastructure. It enables organizations to scan websites, servers, networks, and APIs for security weaknesses, providing a centralized solution for continuous vulnerability management and risk assessment.

Founded in 2019, HostedScan aims to simplify the complexity of cybersecurity by combining multiple industry-standard scanning tools into a single, easy-to-use platform. It integrates well-known scanners such as OpenVAS, Nmap, and OWASP ZAP, allowing users to leverage powerful technologies without the need for manual setup or maintenance.

One of HostedScan’s key strengths is its ability to deliver automated and continuous security monitoring. Users can schedule scans, receive real-time alerts when new vulnerabilities are detected, and generate detailed, audit-ready reports. This helps organizations stay proactive in identifying threats and ensures compliance with security standards such as SOC 2 and ISO 27001.

The platform also provides full visibility into an organization’s attack surface. It can automatically discover assets such as domains, IP addresses, and APIs, and monitor them for misconfigurations or emerging risks. By testing for thousands of known vulnerabilities, including common issues listed in the OWASP Top 10, HostedScan helps businesses prioritize and fix the most critical security gaps.

Another important feature is its support for both external and internal network scanning. With a lightweight agent, users can securely scan internal systems and manage all results from a unified dashboard. This ensures comprehensive coverage of both public-facing and private infrastructure.

records.name: Kavout
records.description: Kavout is an AI-powered investment platform delivering data-driven insights, stock analysis, and smart tools to help investors make better financial decisions.
records.about_store:
Kavout is an advanced financial technology platform that leverages artificial intelligence to transform the way individuals and professionals approach investing. Designed for modern investors, it combines machine learning, big data analytics, and quantitative modeling to deliver actionable insights across various financial markets, including stocks, ETFs, cryptocurrencies, and forex.

At its core, Kavout aims to simplify complex financial data and turn it into meaningful intelligence. The platform analyzes vast datasets from multiple sources—such as market trends, financial reports, and alternative data—to uncover patterns and generate predictive signals. These insights help users identify investment opportunities, manage risks, and optimize their portfolios more effectively.

One of Kavout’s standout features is its suite of AI-driven tools. For example, the AI Stock Picker identifies high-potential stocks using algorithmic strategies, while Smart Signals provide real-time trading opportunities based on data patterns. InvestGPT acts as a virtual financial assistant, offering instant answers and personalized recommendations, making it easier for users to navigate market complexities.

Additionally, Kavout provides tools such as Watchlists for tracking assets, Market Movers for spotting trends, and a Portfolio Toolbox for building and optimizing investment strategies. These features are designed to offer both beginners and experienced investors a comprehensive ecosystem for smarter decision-making.

Founded in the mid-2010s, Kavout has positioned itself as a pioneer in AI-driven investing by democratizing access to institutional-grade analytics. Its mission is to empower users with intelligent tools that enhance performance and reduce uncertainty in financial markets.

Overall, Kavout represents a new generation of investment platforms, where technology and finance converge to provide smarter, faster, and more data-driven investment solutions for a global audience.

records.name: EasyWebinar
records.description: EasyWebinar is an AI-powered platform for hosting live and automated webinars, helping businesses generate leads, engage audiences, and increase revenue.
records.about_store:
EasyWebinar is a comprehensive, AI-powered webinar platform designed to help businesses, entrepreneurs, and educators create, manage, and scale high-converting online events. It combines live streaming, automated webinars, and marketing tools into a single system, allowing users to build complete sales funnels without relying on multiple external platforms.

One of the platform’s core strengths is its ability to transform webinars into consistent revenue-generating systems. Users can host live webinars in ultra-high definition with minimal latency, then convert those sessions into automated “evergreen” webinars that run continuously. This enables businesses to reach global audiences across different time zones while maintaining engagement and driving conversions.

EasyWebinar also offers a wide range of built-in tools that simplify the entire webinar lifecycle. From registration pages and email sequences to follow-ups and customer relationship management (CRM), everything is integrated into one platform. These features help users capture leads, track audience behavior, and automate communication, ensuring that potential customers are nurtured effectively throughout the sales process.

Engagement is another key focus of EasyWebinar. The platform includes interactive features such as real-time chat, polls, and timed calls-to-action, which help presenters connect with attendees and guide them toward purchasing decisions. In addition, advanced analytics provide insights into viewer behavior, enabling users to optimize their webinars for better performance and higher conversion rates.

Designed for scalability, EasyWebinar supports various webinar formats, including live, automated, simulive, and paid events. It can accommodate both small businesses and large enterprises, offering flexibility and enterprise-grade security.

Overall, EasyWebinar stands out as an all-in-one solution that bridges marketing, automation, and audience engagement, empowering users to turn webinars into powerful tools for growth and revenue generation.

records.name: UpHex
records.description: UpHex is an AI-powered ad automation platform helping agencies launch, manage, and scale high-performing marketing campaigns quickly and efficiently.
records.about_store:
UpHex is a powerful Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform designed to help marketing agencies simplify and scale their digital advertising operations. Built specifically for agencies and advertisers, it leverages automation and artificial intelligence to streamline the creation, deployment, and optimization of ad campaigns across platforms like Facebook and Google.

At its core, UpHex focuses on eliminating the complexity of traditional ad management. Instead of manually building campaigns from scratch, users can access a large library of proven, ready-to-use ad templates. These templates can be customized and deployed within minutes, enabling agencies to deliver consistent, high-performing results for multiple clients without increasing workload.

One of UpHex’s standout features is its “template-to-many” approach. This allows users to create a successful campaign once and replicate it across numerous client accounts, saving time and maximizing return on investment. Combined with its three-click campaign launch system, the platform significantly reduces the technical barriers typically associated with digital advertising.

UpHex also provides centralized control by allowing users to connect and manage multiple ad accounts in one place. Its built-in analytics and reporting tools aggregate performance data, giving agencies actionable insights to optimize campaigns and improve results. Additionally, AI-powered tools assist in generating ad creatives and refining targeting strategies, helping users achieve better lead generation outcomes at lower costs.

Beyond technology, UpHex offers educational resources such as live training sessions and community support, making it accessible even for beginners. This combination of automation, scalability, and learning support enables agencies to grow faster while maintaining efficiency.
